patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by a ClassCastException when trying to cast an attribute of type BoundaryAttribute to Boolean. The fix involves checking the type of the attribute before casting it.
The bug is caused by a ClassCastException when trying to cast an attribute of type BoundaryAttribute to Boolean. The fix involves checking the type of the attribute before casting it.
patches.changes:
- if ((Boolean) tree.getAttribute()) {
+ if (tree.getAttribute() instanceof Boolean && (Boolean) tree.getAttribute()) {
